# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: vm-with-public-ip
  type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  location: <your-location>
  properties:
    imageReference:
      publisher: <image-publisher>
      offer: <image-offer>
      sku: <image-sku>
      version: <image-version>
    osDisk:
      name: managed
      caching: ReadWrite
      createOption: Attach
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: <vm-size>
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
      - name: nic-with-public-ip
        properties:
          ipConfigurations:
          - name: public-ip-config
            properties:
              publicIPAddress:
                name: public-ip
                sku:
                  name: Basic
              subnet:
                id: /subscriptions/<subscription-id>/resourceGroups/<resource-group-name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<virtual-network-name>/subnets/<subnet-name>
